titleStmt.title: SII 36.256: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 256. (A.R. No. 256 of 1910.) URATTŪR (Orattūr), CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the base of the Agastyēśvara temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1451 (wrong), Vikruti, Viruchchikam, śu., 5, Friday, Tiruvōṇam = A.D. 1530, November 25, Friday.).

The inscription records a sarvamānya gift of Paṉaittāṅgal, a hamlet of Urattūr in Cheṅgāṭṭu-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam to Tiruvagattīsuramuḍaiya Tambirāṉār, for the merit of Chellappar alias Vīra-Narasiṅgarāya Nāyaka Sāḷuva-Daṇṇāyakkar. It was stipulated that the income from the village shall be utilized by the Tambirānār for conducting services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī man mahāmaṇṭaleśvara hariyarāyarvibhāṭa bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāya kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāya kaṇṭaṉ rācātirāca paramecuraṉ rācakempīraṉ rācamāttāṇṭan rācakulatilaka Oṭṭiyataḷavibhāṭan tulukkamāṉāpayaṅkaraṉ kāttāṉ kaṇṭaṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṉāṭu koṭātāṉ pūruva tekṣaṇa paccima Uttara camuttirātipati śrī vīrappiṟatāpa Accutayyateva mahārāyar piṟutivirācciyampaṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 1 mel cellā niṉṟa vikuṟuti caṅvatcarattu viruccikaṉāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapaṣṣattu pañcamiyum tiruvoṇamum peṟṟa cukkiṟavārattu ṉāḷ Uṟattūr
Uṭaiyār tiruvakattīcuramuṭaiya tampirāṉārku ṉakaram kāñcipuram taḻuvak kuḻaiñcā cellapparāṉa vīraṉaraciṅkarāyaṉāyakka cāḷuvataṇāyakkar taṉmamākap paṇṇikkuṭutta māniyam ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu yiraṇṭāyiraveli paṟṟuc cīrmaiyāṉa ceṅkāṭṭuk koṭṭattuk koṇāṭu Uṟattūrppaṭākai paṉaittāṅkal kiṟāmam ṉāṟppāṟkkellaiyum Uḷpaṭa caṟuvamāṉṉiyammāka koṇṭu Ēṟum kuṭiyum Ēṟṟikkoṇṭu Itiluṇṭāṉa levalokam mellām tiruvakattīcuramuṭai tampirāṉār pūcai tiruppaṇi Aṅkaraṅka vaipokaṅkaḷum naṭattak kaṭaivatākavum yiṉṉayiṉāṟkup paṉaittāṅkal tanmam naṭattiṉavarkaḷ
Āyirārokkiya Ayicuriyamum cantāṉa camu katiyum rutvip piṟasātamu mācap piṟasātamum Uṇṭāy piṟitivirājyam paṇṇak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Intat taṉmam Iyātoruvaṉṉaṭattāmal Ahitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum yiṉṉayiṉār tiruppaṇi ṉavarkaḷum Oru paṇam kalattāḷam vicāvittavarkaḷum civapatam peṟuvār §
Digital edition of SII 36.256 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
